title: 5 AgentExchange Must-Haves Your Team Will Thank You For
author: Adriana Santos

sections.heading: Introduction
sections.text: Everyone wants to hop aboard the AI train, but getting started shouldn’t mean reinventing the wheel. We designed Agentforce to make it easy for users to hit the ground running with intuitive tools likeAgentforce Builderand the industry’s first end-to-end agenticObservabilitysolution. Now with the launch ofAgentExchange, we’ve created a library of prebuilt skills from trustedSalesforce partnersthat give you practical tools to tackle real-world problems. Below, we’ve highlighted five prebuilt AgentExchange skills that unblock common challenges organizations face in their journey to becoming an Agentic Enterprise. The challenge:Limited headcount can put a dent in any GTM strategy. When organizations lack the resources for critical steps like opportunity discovery, deal submission, or seller enablement, they risk losing momentum and missing out on valuable co-sell opportunities. The AgentExchange solution:Tackle for Salesforce: GTM Agent What it does:Tackle’s GTM Agent brings AI-powered co-sell guidance into Salesforce. Think of it as an extension of your team that equips partner leaders and sellers by identifying opportunities, mapping key contacts, and helping you prepare for meetings. With a simple prompt, it can uncover the most relevant co-sell-ready opportunities, eliminating manual search and accelerating partner engagement. The challenge:Your client base is growing, but your customers’ demands are too. To meet rising demand, you hire more developers. But with growth comes new complexity. Managing 100 developers with multiple workstreams can create deployment issues and delays. How do you manage your customers’ growing needs while continuing to innovate? The AgentExchange solution:DevOps Automation Agent for Agentforce What it does:Copado’s Automation Agent for Agentforce guides Salesforce developers and release managers through the entire software lifecycle – from planning and building to testing, releasing, and operating. It offers intelligent automation for user story creation, release management, and deployment troubleshooting, making it easy to build Agentforce applications faster with better quality. The challenge:Point solutions and manual processes are clunky and time-consuming, but digitizing your legacy on-premise files is an IT and compliance nightmare. The AgentExchange solution:Box for Agentforce What it does:Box automates intelligent document processing by extracting critical metadata from forms and POs. The secure platform also creates a compliant, centralized single source of truth across Salesforce and your entire application ecosystem. It instantly initiates workflows in Agentforce to complete the next step, cutting critical time-to-action. The challenge:You want your sales team to spend time selling, not searching for the right case study, pitch deck, or one-pager. And because timing is everything, a sluggish sales cycle can be the difference between hitting your quota or deferring crucial revenue until next year. The AgentExchange solution:Highspot for Agentforce What it does:With Highspot for Agentforce, you can equip your sales reps with the right content at the right time. You’ll get immediate, accurate answers to all sales, marketing, and product related questions based on Highspot content and buyer engagement analytics directly in Agentforce. The challenge:Sales teams are often saddled with clunky workflows and manual, repetitive tasks that slow down the sales cycle and risk souring customer relationships and missing revenue goals. The AgentExchange solution:DocuSign for Agentforce What it does:With DocuSign for Agentforce, sellers can do what they do best – sell. This free Agentforce action pulls customer details from Salesforce records to automatically populate the agreement. It also sends documents for signature directly from Agentforce so you never have to leave the flow of work – eliminating manual steps and keeping sellers focused on closing deals. Whether you need a GTM agent to scale co-selling, a DevOps agent to accelerate time-to-innovation, or an e-signature agent to eliminate deal friction, don’t waste valuable time building from scratch. Get started today by deploying your first prebuilt skill fromAgentExchange.

AI agent marketplaces are digital platforms where developers, businesses, and individuals can buy, sell, and trade artificial intelligence (AI) agents, applications, and services. existing_ctas.heading: Build and Deploy Agentic AI Faster with Trusted Partners
existing_ctas.body: Download our guide and discover prebuilt skills on AgentExchange, the trusted agentic marketplace built into Salesforce.

raw_html:
Everyone wants to hop aboard the AI train, but getting started shouldn’t mean reinventing the wheel. We designed Agentforce to make it easy for users to hit the ground running with intuitive tools like Agentforce Builder and the industry’s first end-to-end agentic Observability solution. Now with the launch of AgentExchange, we’ve created a library of prebuilt skills from trusted Salesforce partners that give you practical tools to tackle real-world problems. 

Below, we’ve highlighted five prebuilt AgentExchange skills that unblock common challenges organizations face in their journey to becoming an Agentic Enterprise.  

1. Don’t let headcount be your co-sell ceiling

The challenge: Limited headcount can put a dent in any GTM strategy. When organizations lack the resources for critical steps like opportunity discovery, deal submission, or seller enablement, they risk losing momentum and missing out on valuable  co-sell opportunities.

The AgentExchange solution: Tackle for Salesforce: GTM Agent

What it does: Tackle’s GTM Agent brings AI-powered co-sell guidance into Salesforce. Think of it as an extension of your team that equips partner leaders and sellers by identifying opportunities, mapping key contacts, and helping you prepare for meetings. With a simple prompt, it can uncover the most relevant co-sell-ready opportunities, eliminating manual search and accelerating partner engagement.

2. Sprawling workstreams are stifling your innovation

The challenge: Your client base is growing, but your customers’ demands are too. To meet rising demand, you hire more developers. But with growth comes new complexity.   Managing 100 developers with multiple workstreams can create deployment issues and delays. How do you manage your customers’ growing needs while continuing to innovate?

The AgentExchange solution: DevOps Automation Agent for Agentforce

What it does: Copado’s Automation Agent for Agentforce guides Salesforce developers and release managers through the entire software lifecycle – from planning and building to testing, releasing, and operating. It offers intelligent automation for user story creation, release management, and deployment troubleshooting, making it easy to build Agentforce applications faster with better quality.

Build and Deploy Agentic AI Faster with Trusted Partners

Download our guide and discover prebuilt skills on AgentExchange, the trusted agentic marketplace built into Salesforce.

Learn more

3. Point solutions and paper processes are an integration roadblock

The challenge: Point solutions and manual processes are clunky and time-consuming, but digitizing your legacy on-premise files is an IT and compliance nightmare. 

The AgentExchange solution: Box for Agentforce 

What it does: Box automates intelligent document processing by extracting critical metadata from forms and POs. The secure platform also creates a compliant, centralized single source of truth across Salesforce and your entire application ecosystem. It instantly initiates workflows in Agentforce to complete the next step, cutting critical time-to-action.

4. Your sellers aren’t finding your best enablement materials 

The challenge: You want your sales team to spend time selling, not searching for the right case study, pitch deck, or one-pager. And because timing is everything, a sluggish sales cycle can be the difference between hitting your quota  or deferring crucial revenue until next year.

The AgentExchange solution: Highspot for Agentforce

What it does: With Highspot for Agentforce, you can equip your sales reps with the right content at the right time. You’ll get immediate, accurate answers to all sales, marketing, and product related questions based on Highspot content and buyer engagement analytics directly in Agentforce. 

5. Task overload is derailing deals and killing Quota

The challenge: Sales teams are often saddled with clunky workflows and manual, repetitive tasks that slow down the sales cycle and risk souring customer relationships and missing revenue goals. 

The AgentExchange solution: DocuSign for Agentforce

What it does: With DocuSign for Agentforce, sellers can do what they do best – sell. This free Agentforce action pulls customer details from Salesforce records to automatically populate the agreement. It also sends documents for signature directly from Agentforce so you never have to leave the flow of work – eliminating manual steps and keeping sellers focused on closing deals.

Spend more time delivering customer value with AgentExchange

Whether you need a GTM agent to scale co-selling, a DevOps agent to accelerate time-to-innovation, or an e-signature agent to eliminate deal friction, don’t waste valuable time building from scratch. Get started today by deploying your first prebuilt skill from AgentExchange.

Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs)

What is AgentExchange?

AgentExchange is the trusted agentic marketplace, built into Salesforce. With AgentExchange, customers can extend their agentic enterprise with hundreds of pre-built agents and agentic skills from trusted partners.

AgentExchange makes it easy to deploy AI agents. This saves your business time and money. You can explore agent skills directly on the marketplace or within Salesforce’s Agentforce Builder tools. This makes it easy to find the right solutions for your use case, product, or industry right in your flow of work.

What is an AI agent marketplace?

AI agent marketplaces are digital platforms where developers, businesses, and individuals can buy, sell, and trade artificial intelligence (AI) agents, applications, and services. These marketplaces offer a centralized environment to access a wide range of agentic AI capabilities, eliminating the need to develop them from scratch.

Can I build a business with AgentExchange?

Yes, AgentExchange provides partners with a platform to monetize their expertise and capture their share of the rapidly growing AI agent market. Partners can build, test, and distribute their AI solutions, reaching a wide audience of Salesforce customers.
